[{"Name":"Niall O' Flaherty","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKSEMohz1Ad9RqO9RK5-U9zK4D6Qth9f3-NF8U7CI2uolbFZA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Private scooter tour around Hue - Styles Motorbikes

It's been almost 10 years since we were in Hue so we wanted to hire a guide / driver and follow him on our own scooter.

Last week we completed the Ha Giang Loop with Styles Motorbikes (Ha Giang shop) and their service far exceeded our expectations so we knew to look no further than Styles Hue. I left a separate review regarding that.

I sent an email with our requests (See outside of the tourist areas, English speaking driver, our own scooter and we would follow) and within an hour we had a reply with everything set-up for us... we just had to show up at the shop at our requested time. Thank you 'Thao' and 'My' for your excellent and quick communication as always.

Immediately upon arrival, a smiling guy by the name of 'Jaiden' introduced himself. His English was so good I thought he was Australian or English! He is 100% Vietnamese but just has amazingly good English. Turns out that Jaiden was going to be our guide for the day.

Jaiden did exactly as we requested; we went outside the city and saw some of the 'non tourist' stuff. Not only that, but Jaiden had an amazing knowledge of everywhere he brought us, we learned a lot not only about the local area but about Vietnam culture in general. Jaiden - thank you so much for taking care of us for the day.

Styles don't actually advertise this service and Jaiden said it was  bit 'bespoke', so, if you have any special requests, don't hesitate to email Styles and they will cater to your needs.

I also found the price very fair. Sure, you might get something a few $$ cheaper off some random guy on the street but Styles is an established company (operating in 4 countries), their staff are professional, their bikes are in proper order and as with any proper business, they have all the insurance / paperwork etc. in place - I actually felt that we got excellent value for money as the service far exceeded our expectations. Be sure to show your appreciation with a tip for these guides / drivers - they genuinely go above and beyond for the customer.

I am just a happy customer (twice now) of Styles but seriously, don't hesitate to contact them for any of your biking / tour needs in Hoi An / Hue / Hanoi / Ha Giang (they probably have more shops that i'm not aware of).

Thanks folks - i'll likely be in touch for some adventures in Hoi An next week!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Adam Z","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJQvMmHwkffZ39bNSiFypkSOcRLfkQHJ1_vIu5_xIRin76r7g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Had a great ride from Hoi anh to hue. Kind of a chaotic mess when you first get here but it's not so bad.

There are 3 buildings in a "U" shape. The "I" parts are departure/arrival points. The "_" part is where you can buy tickets OR turn your online ticket into an actual bus ticket. There are separate windows for all bus agencies.

Adjust you app and remove stops that are not in service.
My suggestion is to us barcodes that actually show the routes of the buses in service. Not the locations in words, actual mapping. Place the barcodes at the bus stops and even in other locations. When something changes just have the drivers place new stickers at the stops.
You can print these off in your office. You can adjust these link anytime. Just be sure to have the stickers all changed.

Booked 'Cocovip limousine' for a trip up to Hoi An 10 days in advance. A few days before my trip I received an email asking for more money to secure my ticket as there had been a problem with the site (this was around Tet so demand was high) After thinking it was a scam email I replied asking 'why I should have to pay more when my ticket was confirmed'they cancelled my ticket. This was the night before my trip. I've seen other reviews with similar stories. Absolutely chancers, squeezing money out of desperate people, do not trust them.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alfie Connolly","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX6vf40DufGQ9jDfmlQ5hZE6-KBJfIR84izjuFoJ3tJrimO8thf=s120-c-rp-mo-ba12-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Our experience with Hoianbus & Danangbus (known as Cocovip on 12goAsia) was brilliant. These were our only 2 proper sleepers buses in Vietnam (10 hours from Nha Trang to Hoi An & 13 hours from Da Nang to Ninh Binh), so we wanted to make sure we were as comfortable as possible and booked the Luxury cabin options.

The only down side was that they didn’t offer a shuttle to the bus stop like some companies, but they did message us on WhatsApp a couple of hours before and were in constant communication until we got on the buses (Special shoutout to Hà who was very responsive and gave us all the information we needed to arrive on time for the bus).

Our experience on the buses themselves were great. I know there are some complaints across all companies about honking at night by the driver, but in Vietnam this is normal as it is used to overtake so we can’t really complain about that.

The cabins were spacious and comfortable, had TVs (only one channel so not too much of a bonus), USB charging ports, water bottle holders and reading lights aswell as blackout blinds.

As someone who worries about needing the toilet I was pretty comfortable on the buses (on the first there was a toilet on board and although the second didn’t we stopped every few hours, but I slept through anyway). Also there were toilets at the stations where you wait so you can go before too.

Overall, it was a good choice to choose this company and we would use them again if we come back to Vietnam","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn03JQHmnpFMdOl991zv_1InKOvUZ_MOjManpc5OJEkPFvtSDxaCPeuE27ykFhIuCo2IWFmoiEqeR6tE0XgcQzIaSToAsC2VN6gepoMcwUqoym7Eh8vtDgvym5DBIwGzyOaSL7P0=k-no","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn17JJjfkMU87B5t6P1AojGeLMCKZzUVifU4s1Qc7_Zfio0c3DIXhv7onRMyu5kOWVZ9CrcQ82Hwyfd0aN52mnw-9mIkEIQyAMD3_QcKI51oarLZZXad58cTFR1bhakOY02v-XYJ=k-no","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn1Cif0W8w9MYgEQZ0qgdGKgo87QubjZGjlwgKSNfDAWyMmCjV7LvCbfOeVN6aqqQovda7aJm1E30VjkqYLpor0Ag-70ZxQmkZQMGNlI9Q037kMzXEAmFY6gnyZLEFkvmeCh3kg0=k-no"],"When":"2025-4-11"},{"Name":"Catalina Werth","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX1utb0y0Ldp8u5IpvB0mFnjfdYg9dY38tcMJp8HWKUeIv3Q516=s120-c-rp-mo-ba12-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Even though the bed is more comfortable than on other buses, it's impossible to sleep good because the driver frantically honks his horn EVERY MINUTE. Nhớ khi xưa năm 1985 khi về Trung Phước- Quế Sơn hay về Gò Nổi - Điện Quang là mình xuống bến phà nhỏ lên xuồng máy ngay dưới chân cầu Vĩnh Điện
Mỗi lần đi qua nơi đây nhớ bao kỷ niệm xưa cũ","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn1ILxDcGQf09UkM9-csz2JfWSUDTU5jWI-C9_jqXtZyTCSmYNx6DAhOMwZ3AySwX9hNyh0RnHDsFCPQu7y3tPTbztTaK010tSnYpK9FW4o94qf1x4dXXb0yUpiCHcOQiYJawRvOYrDW6cvw=k-no","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn1ZcHYa_rl9Rtmi24CwXA8YMZTfP0XAbUES1Mj9hjyhHCsGeBJY_xjMZ_l7bAnndNc2261OsYsNGge9QQwpEQwlwMKGGylUAVDF-e4npruFZYlJPALgbAhRZyHUMdFo0vzCxb1hmB8VUmXC=k-no"],"When":"2025-12-23"},{"Name":"Trung Ha","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX9MGJOhnjMh24wy1KMNG1VK3C9vLJd341-X89yk5vWMZqED7NSDA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba12-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Cầu Vĩnh Điện, bắc qua sông Vĩnh Điện nối phường Điện An và Điện Minh, thị xã Điện Bàn, Quảng Nam, là công trình giao thông quan trọng với chiều dài 171m và rộng 17m. Dự án được khởi công từ năm 2017, dự kiến hoàn thành vào năm 2019, nhưng đến nay vẫn chưa thể đưa vào sử dụng do thiếu đường dẫn hai đầu cầu.

Mặc dù phần cầu đã hoàn thiện, nhưng việc thiếu đường dẫn khiến công trình chưa phát huy hiệu quả. Người dân địa phương phải sử dụng cầu sắt Ngân Hà đã xuống cấp để di chuyển, gây nguy hiểm cho người tham gia giao thông.

Dự án cầu Vĩnh Điện có tổng mức đầu tư 228 tỷ đồng, thuộc tuyến đường vành đai phía bắc Quảng Nam, nhằm thúc đẩy phát triển đô thị Điện Bàn và kết nối giao thông trong khu vực . Tuy nhiên, tiến độ thi công chậm chạp và thiếu đồng bộ giữa cầu và đường dẫn đã ảnh hưởng đến hiệu quả sử dụng công trình.

Để phát huy tối đa hiệu quả của dự án, cần có sự chỉ đạo quyết liệt từ các cấp chính quyền trong việc giải phóng mặt bằng và hoàn thiện đường dẫn hai đầu cầu. Điều này không chỉ đảm bảo an toàn giao thông mà còn góp phần thúc đẩy phát triển kinh tế - xã hội tại địa phương.","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn3uNy1-wxic26-FdZVlTLFjZ36OZykfk194hM7sAKJtNDCFBmdWmz5UI2ux0a3ElqS1MFi3htdMhvMPWkhJy9UaAauAu9USNACK9L9bSlkSGXol4y2GkqGwVvxCorxGjnagfTmaWA=k-no","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn0yki5cyKFIyz3AEHB94YkZNoByJeYViOKuD9IlcMWibwpjN-U-wdSR5bEev3jkMLsQgA7jcRMAVgjV7vuTJdLepboOD5M2DRYA3rARcrVZHg0G0gFhKyE5h680m_rT31fvxdBtGw=k-no","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn1QwBDg_QPYRXq_mEyzAZWaFwlDKP1R7oTOnci_ugNjMlqu3umRmT6cFPxwSAcCVPGReej7DPXw_rVIKYokQb4HzX9wB68tXP28e_jGgyb-J_mJRNl8uqCPjcSiDLmwRUr1RGcA=k-no","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn1Jctk0juAXbydahm6JZ07Q4qqkDUylLVPp4K0aRMEpB5jCN6_nvCWk-pGbeizM5tXLbuGjr3RPbR8ne4TaGuWR1Nm4nzJrvOk50yPN7t23Kk5jcl4e8paGtjo--RYrkgVA0IrR3A=k-no","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn3LCoRjtcIcFs4OPVTDjolIZ6dYdqA100AbIFawFWg-wfUc1-xbPJaSHDCXEvHnxMRNucudpgF9cGbfdyTj03GtT3RLmlo8C79O0JKXg2pjJ9jhESuIhqwbczpC1DGYUEw7JoE=k-no"],"When":"2025-5-24"},{"Name":"Võ Ngọc Bích","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUncjeicNHwlbpgy2YHWl8gzaqBUJKrAG02N8EoMWOiiErv6DsL=s120-c-rp-mo-ba12-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Chiếc cầu quen thuộc với người Quảng Nam. Cash only for everything . Their professional photos/videos can be airdropped 5000VND /photo and 20,000vnd for video. Restaurant served inexpensive home cooked Vietnamese food to order.  It was tasty and filling.
Of those activities that were included in admission:
Fish spa was fun. Zipline & Archery only for 14 yrs plus. Pool and water slide were available but we didn't partake. Zipline that dips in water was not open today. title: Naman Retreat
address: Trường Sa, Road, Ngũ Hành Sơn, Đà Nẵng 550000, Vietnam
plus_code: X79M+VM Ngu Hanh Son, Da Nang, Vietnam
descriptions: Refined seaside property offering lavish rooms & villas, some with private pools, plus posh dining.
complete_address: {"borough":"Road, Ngu Hanh Son","street":"Trường Sa","city":"Da Nang","postal_code":"550000","state":"Ngu Hanh Son, Da Nang","country":"VN"}
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Lam Ho","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXl-qVGlG2W_A7hscu0w5zFoWXklJKtEPA7itP1qZ4OuraD9-Q5=s120-c-rp-mo-ba12-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Naman is possibly Da Nang's best kept secret. Nestled in a peaceful slice of the coast, Naman Retreat has all one can need: delicious food, multiple yoga classes per day, walking paths, beach access, and a range of rooms for any price point. And you won't worry about money too much—the prices are fair, and Naman never gave me the impression it was nickle-and-diming me. Instead, the staff helped me every step of the way and communicated clearly.

This is not to mention the countless pools across the property and unparalleled breakfast bar. During my stay, Dev, the yoga teacher, provided a safe place for healing and reflection. Vivian checked in on me every day to ensure the room and stay were to our liking. But what stuck with me was the care shown by the entire staff that worked the wedding on the evening of March 7. I have never seen a staff with such stamina—it was a long wedding with many guests—but most importantly, the familial hospitality we all wish for when celebrating dear friends. Those who served our drinks and dinner were phenomenal and truly attentive.

I hope the wedding staff will receive the recognition they deserve for their hard work. They truly felt like family, and I look forward to seeing them when I return to Naman.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Trip.com Member","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0QeCck1CfANpZm9bBk3PHtP97Kh9k25HZfvq9yAWlN3BaIyjSHUPEfWkhAJmuYiJsH-_6g=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"The location is truly exceptional, and the infinity pool, beach, and whirlpool made our stay unforgettable. While the hotel room was quite basic, it was sufficient since we spent most of our time at the pool, the beach, and the restaurants. The staff were incredibly friendly and helpful, adding to the overall positive experience!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Pollo Pollo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXxeSDwzoHiAgzh3D-kz_uRgFrE6G2YIzhInSUXVG81kS9T_Vk=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had a wonderful stay at Naman Retreat.
The resort is beautiful and peaceful, with a perfect mix of nature and modern design. The beach and pools were amazing, and the atmosphere made it easy to truly relax.

The staff were very kind and attentive throughout our stay. Especially Everlyn, who was very helpful and made us feel warmly welcomed. Her support and friendliness really made our experience even better.

We would definitely love to come back again and highly recommend Naman Retreat to anyone visiting Da Nang.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Keita I","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLo0Ma3XPaOCew3IW4J2v0uFttf4VyFAgqxw6Mpxk2MZw_iKw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had the most wonderful stay at this hotel for our honeymoon. From the moment we arrived, the staff made us feel truly special.
As a thoughtful surprise, we received a complimentary cake, which made our celebration even more memorable. We were deeply touched by this warm gesture.
The room was spotless and beautifully maintained. The bathroom was clean and comfortable, and the pool area was also immaculate and relaxing. Every part of the property was well cared for, creating a luxurious and peaceful atmosphere.
The food was exceptional — every dish we tried was absolutely delicious. The quality, presentation, and variety exceeded our expectations.
Thank you for making our honeymoon such a perfect and unforgettable experience. We would highly recommend this hotel to anyone looking for a special and comfortable stay.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"윤주김","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU_ekGx3g_8A61uiRuIgIJJfFAgihYlDaiMopQtsXFT8waZitU=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My friend and I had a truly wonderful time at Naman Retreat! The resort itself is beautiful, but the service from the staff is what makes it exceptional. In particular, Jasmine was incredibly kind and attentive throughout our stay. Thanks to her thoughtful care, my friend and I were able to finish our trip comfortably and happily. This was the most memorable part of our Da Nang trip. Thank you so much for everything, Jasmine!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Brandon Bisnette","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWiBhbtinjf5VKbbcF81w7b7kHhL2wtoy7UAaz0NYn2I7S1VYjA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Absolutely beautiful resort! We had a private pool villa and it was exceptionally clean and everything worked perfectly. A very restful and private room to stay in. The resort was very well maintained and calming. A great pool on the beach, plus a pool bar for afternoon cocktails, and three different restaurants to choose from. All of the staff were exceptionally caring and made a great effort to make our stay memorable. It was easy to travel to both Da Nang and Hoi Ann from the resort, though we didn't want to leave too often with the excellent food, daily massages and multiple pool options on top of the beach. The Wellness Centre offered lots of options with yoga, gym and massages. Our Ambassador Alina, was our prime point of contact, and sorted out any question we had promptly and professionally. This was a perfect getaway for us as a couple, and we would recommend Naman Retreat to anyone!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"minsub lee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJRZPkdCsBnBzezhS4BPy8VJ8Zve_YvGoCLK49oQuzBWmNCIg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had an amazing stay at the resort, and a big part of that was thanks to our personal assistant, Vivian
Alina was incredibly kind, professional, and always quick to respond whenever we needed help. She took great care of us from start to finish and made sure everything was smooth and comfortable, especially while traveling with our family.
Her warm attitude and attention to detail truly made our stay special. We felt very well looked after and could fully relax thanks to her support.
Thank you so much, Vivian. You made our stay unforgettable. We sincerely hope to see you again next time!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"송민호","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKXWvO1XDK_XyZL3TqIm4ZcspDDu3S2ovciPvJXaPHHYz2pvQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba12-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"There is someone I am so grateful for during my stay at the resort. The resort was so pretty and sensual. The pool was great, and the private pool was great. The room was pretty and we decided to move around, but there was no inconvenience at all. The breakfast was also very delicious.","Images":null,"When":""}]

title: Da Nang Hoa Khanh 16 Gas Station
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Thành Nguyễn Trung","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLu3J54fIneOU036KNNn115Np6sa9vTMbtwCqBOmJPflRnqyA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Mình xin chia sẻ chi tiết trải nghiệm 5 sao của mình tại Cây xăng Đà Nẵng Hòa Khánh 16, vì thật sự đây là một trong những cây xăng để lại ấn tượng tốt nhất từ trước đến nay.

Mình ghé vào đổ xăng vào buổi tối khá muộn, khoảng gần 10 giờ đêm. Lúc đó trời đã tối hẳn nhưng khu vực cây xăng vẫn được chiếu sáng rất đầy đủ, ánh đèn vàng tạo cảm giác an toàn và dễ quan sát. Ngay từ khi vừa chạy xe vào, mình đã thấy khu vực sân bãi rất rộng rãi, không bị chật chội hay lộn xộn như một số cây xăng khác. Xe máy, ô tô, thậm chí xe tải ra vào liên tục nhưng vẫn rất trật tự, không có tình trạng chen lấn hay kẹt xe.

Điểm cộng đầu tiên phải nói đến là nhân viên phục vụ. Các bạn nhân viên ở đây rất nhanh nhẹn, chủ động hướng dẫn xe vào đúng vị trí, thái độ cực kỳ lịch sự và thân thiện. Khi mình vừa dừng xe, đã có nhân viên ra chào hỏi, hỏi rõ loại xăng cần đổ và số tiền mong muốn. Thao tác bơm xăng rất chuyên nghiệp, rõ ràng, đồng hồ hiển thị dễ nhìn nên mình hoàn toàn yên tâm về lượng xăng được đổ. Đây là điều mình rất quan tâm mỗi khi ghé cây xăng, vì sự minh bạch luôn là yếu tố quan trọng nhất.

Trong lúc chờ đổ xăng, mình có để ý xung quanh và thật sự khá ấn tượng với độ sạch sẽ của khu vực. Sàn bãi được quét dọn gọn gàng, không có rác vương vãi hay mùi xăng dầu quá nồng như một số nơi khác. Khu vực đặt trụ bơm được bố trí ngăn nắp, dây ống gọn gàng, không gây vướng víu cho người đi lại. Nhà vệ sinh và khu vực phụ trợ (nếu có) nhìn cũng khá sạch, tạo cảm giác đây là một cây xăng được quản lý rất tốt.

Một điểm mình đánh giá cao nữa là tốc độ phục vụ. Mặc dù thời điểm đó khá đông xe, nhưng mình chỉ phải chờ rất ngắn, gần như không có cảm giác sốt ruột. Nhân viên phối hợp nhịp nhàng, mỗi người phụ trách một trụ bơm nên dòng xe di chuyển liên tục, không bị ùn ứ. Sau khi đổ xăng xong, nhân viên còn nhắc mình kiểm tra lại nắp bình xăng cẩn thận trước khi rời đi, một chi tiết nhỏ nhưng thể hiện sự chu đáo.

Về vị trí, cây xăng nằm ngay khu vực Hòa Khánh, trên trục đường khá lớn nên rất thuận tiện cho cả người dân địa phương lẫn xe đường dài. Dễ tìm, bảng hiệu rõ ràng, từ xa đã có thể nhận ra. Với những ai thường xuyên di chuyển ban đêm hoặc đi làm ca muộn, đây thật sự là một điểm dừng chân rất an tâm.

Điều khiến mình hài lòng nhất chính là cảm giác uy tín và chuyên nghiệp mà cây xăng mang lại. Từ thái độ nhân viên, cách bố trí không gian, cho đến quy trình bơm xăng đều rất chỉnh chu. Không có cảm giác vội vàng, cẩu thả hay thiếu minh bạch. Mình ra về với tâm trạng khá thoải mái, cảm thấy đã chọn đúng nơi để đổ xăng.

Tổng kết lại, theo cảm nhận cá nhân của mình:
•	Không gian rộng rãi, thoáng mát, an toàn
•	Nhân viên lịch sự, nhiệt tình, làm việc chuyên nghiệp
•	Quy trình bơm xăng rõ ràng, minh bạch
•	Khu vực sạch sẽ, ánh sáng đầy đủ vào ban đêm
•	Vị trí thuận tiện, dễ tìm

Với tất cả những điểm cộng đó, mình hoàn toàn đánh giá 5 sao cho Cây xăng Đà Nẵng Hòa Khánh 16. Đây chắc chắn sẽ là địa điểm mình tiếp tục lựa chọn mỗi khi có dịp đi ngang qua khu vực này. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Huggy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWIATa-TtNhtohfg0dEh_mImpqZuN6j_ax-AmWCBB5O9EnuWf0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A spiritual and cultural highlight in Da Nang – Highly recommended!
​After some rather "touristy" experiences in the city, the Marble Mountains were a breath of fresh air. This place offers everything I was looking for: deep culture, impressive history, and breathtaking views.
​The blend of natural limestone caves and beautifully integrated Buddhist pagodas creates a unique, spiritual atmosphere. Climbing the stairs is worth it for the panoramic views over the coast, but the highlight for me was the intricate stone carvings and the quiet energy inside the caves. It feels authentic and respectful of its heritage.
​If you appreciate history and want to experience the "real" Vietnam away from the flashy tourist traps, this is a must-see. It’s affordable, well-maintained, and truly memorable. 5 stars without hesitation!","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn2tuj88cvjnDzqolvMprH4AXeUY-qWGf4k_JRPoldRzbaUojbKZX-gsw4ikKjNsvEzdqr4Ip3tWn7m8FXZLssjZ3A3Aprk-Fv-qJauoXv4L51cXkaSeLv80zX_P1Zvz8QwnDZiWghrgnSB-=k-no","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn0u66sT61Xsh2r3yoMo1ud_lgUEwFPP1nQJulU02d2fmTLk88AABLgdaTRNxMMuj6HucBs6YaeR2CcSfpBtKHjX5JvQJl_ddQbNtPzTKXJukF1u6MDCwb4PwIoFOBS4V3J5HAEg5UeCPOUA=k-no","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn2GspgCN-74kKyWEQe9qb_KctCTxMdo6-LtWam2-JH7vdm-rdGQf9v0vFhaoWE41DqVyffKa7YpJr7iiam2WJQA-Ng_qgA4pc54Ui9-Rg7PkSEFsJbFiCzcRYgDv_kQqfAzIN1zsJen8sE=k-no","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn2JqIEqqfvhk0Q7GWjCWk4-gs3rzjwtLBfuY06zBWMPXRiEgUjv6428-MK65gBe4kYWWESVbqqLlwon5cl7XvRJuhWgJ7B_D-ZihZOkxgYnLA8yv1RUTwvGyRI47nWFA9GOJVimOl0taKjA=k-no","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn3wbxwNm2VCNej9hft4IMK9StAnqb7c9pNZaoQrY3x_buoiB0IyLuNuD8G8itzLKrbFlsEt4mYwsGgCEeIzayOQ5H2B-DsxJRe86f_H0-U_GDb10SxBkzp5BDStkeVz55YvvODmiuF2pzmC=k-no"],"When":"2026-2-15"},{"Name":"Chetan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVZxx8HhZ1X0vnwlNs6ojN80QwohyZ4738pKXO2yGzRzdlyzAA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The Marble Mountains are a must-see when you are in Da Nang. It is a group of five hills with beautiful caves, old pagodas, and great viewpoints. There is so much to explore, and every cave feels like a hidden surprise.
You can take the elevator to go up for an extra charge, but the real fun is taking the stairs because you can see more of the beauty. It is not actually a long walk, and you can easily reach the top in about 20 minutes.

Holm Andersen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVr2KKOqakeqwK_uJsONAZOHF5Blq8ygg5sgD0scWf8cyHUcdtWVQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A fantastic experience with the perfect balance of nature and culture ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

I just visited Marble Mountains in Da Nang, and it was a wonderful experience! The area is incredibly beautiful with its dramatic cliffs and impressive pagodas tucked away in the lush landscape.

One thing I really appreciated was the trail itself. Even though there are quite a few stairs and climbs, there are plenty of spots to take a break along the way. You don't feel rushed, as there are natural stops where you can sit and enjoy the view of the city and the coast. We chose to take the stairs all the way up instead of waiting for the elevator, and it turned out to be much faster than standing in line!

Practical info:
Facilities: There are good restroom facilities along the route, which makes the trip much more comfortable and manageable.

Refreshments: You don't need to carry too much water yourself, as there are several places along the way where you can buy cold drinks. It was a very welcome relief in the heat!

The caves are an absolute highlight – the light coming through the ceiling creates a truly magical atmosphere. You cannot trust the image on the official website... On the website it shows you train direction... I ended up traveling backwards!!

I recently traveled from Da Nang to Huế by train, and here's what I found at Da Nang Train Station:

Facilities: The station is functional but basic. It has a ticket office open from 6:00 AM to 11:00 PM, offering air-conditioned waiting areas and restrooms. There are also a few shops selling snacks and drinks, though they close by 5:00 PM. If you're arriving late, vending machines outside provide cold drinks.

Comfort: The train ride itself was decent. I opted for a soft seat, which was reasonably comfortable for the journey. The train was clean, and the staff were polite. However, the ride can be a bit bumpy, so be prepared for some movement.

Luggage & Parking: There's a luggage office next to the ticket counter where you can store your bags or arrange to send your motorbike ahead. The station also offers 24-hour parking with staff assistance, which is convenient if you're driving.

Accessibility: The station is easily accessible by taxi or Grab, with the main entrance on Hai Phong Street. It's also a short walk from the Da Nang Bus Station.

Overall: Da Nang Train Station is adequate for short trips like mine to Huế. It's not luxurious, but it gets the job done. If you're looking for a straightforward and budget-friendly way to travel, this station serves its purpose.","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn1YHScHOyiU48u1iJBUPGxD7cFb5qDtZTfSFS0XIEfgfdlTtOg-XhmWshbQAplcXn3RvKfXNVnohtlNtzJ10usvBlcXR9XGE57t1SQ8OVImPyVV4muyUAVdcD7IowGR2b6leKOp1u-VXMQ6=k-no","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn2WhhC9tc5FzsOcOFzuACvl9-QBp7r1HJj0l9Zn8q7U3Sckoheh8CGKFnkVUPm0hEfjB_bvC0v3DR19Rf019uFuZHrro1drPJEvIVpfTDFnJOUgDXgc0GkZBKLthXUoxB4ytD8iPP-nwBc=k-no","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn1-jicFH_a3ZgVOFCbNVCr9Lr0jQYm5yZ3ILLCbVdGjl8-khlEVAERkt6fZ6HYwB_qmBFc7j0U5zPriWA0E5Vus273KW2C1ATFCzEOHLinckXfCOZ9zEmLfNXlf0exW6BRBeo2Kn0-9vClQ=k-no","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn1ImTBCm1LkZ3_SQrjJIyU7f9Av9clrr4hetgiQF79IWA5kJkQmH6djRnrXKpr41AOpUhAcIvalxrvimjPtLQubxTIlGLcSAFSQ-Ah6xe59O3gH-rUA6GjM6TWIWFDnu52iYqOf9MERjUkj=k-no","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn2or5DSWbxHomSUn8ZfarCcJV1hBDpFTiSdxiHcoSsEfQmvGOS3iXhg_ecN2ZE2LHyR8VDuV_m-7IzPtYVFg97PS6xONaoGOOjhwxPU4xPWOuZhsb2Xg6cZwb0CFnvm0FH7O_hKrb430o4=k-no","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn1-E9lICiDWUQO4T4ssBjTr-itGDD52ZknT6v5JdBOVMsFWx1i8zyw2qVGai6yvY1V74aF7vvapo7nWWEdBD2wjyLw3JdKS6UKjTVI3SewAfoe_zNWdvAoqCD6sSiToJpCO6lKxoTjWHVU=k-no"],"When":"2025-9-15"},{"Name":"Michael Case","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXq9u5zaS9wPcqzCPH19uPfbmCK6vdoZVvIDTeuzE0elFSagbM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba12-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We were dropped here to catch the train to Hue. title: Parada No 34 Bus a Hoi An
address: 34 Ngũ Hành, PhúNgũ Hành Sơn, Đà Nẵng 550000, Vietnam
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Secano","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWRIHbGhka4UOVHGK_VW5b7b5BOt_Tcuc5utpLuvBcO1wFUZgY=s120-c-rp-mo-ba12-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"La app DanaBus da instrcciones precisas que ahí para el bus No 2 a Hoi An y pasa cada 20 - 30 minutos.
Yo espere más de uno hora y el bus no pasó. Le pregunté a dos personas con locales comerciales y uno me dijo que no había bus y otro que si.
Espere un poco más y me tomé un Moto Gran por 120 k VDN.

Dejo a continuación las instrucciones de la app mencionada:

• The Bus Stop: Look for a blue sign with a bus icon. I suggest pinning '34 Ngu Hanh Son' on your Grab app; the driver will drop you right at the stop.
• The Bus: It is a bright ORANGE bus with 'No. 02' and 'Hoi An' written clearly on the front electronic board.
• The Direction: At the stop No. 34, all buses go toward Hoi An. To be 100% sure, just ask the conductor when you board: 'Hoi An?', they will nod if it's correct.
• The Fare: It's 35,000 VND. You pay in cash to the conductor after you sit down.","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn3ghNcIexCvmAyLALUZDYv-jH3_MF9ryC2F5t7Nl4m5Ite8xQprKfLR-jiwbJftuaQp1xtRW0XyA3EMSrnjjGbSX8vGc_xsGojDCqhl6C4eQx-dZsh0su5lwG_VjtOAxIz2Ozi02TF_7fIb=k-no","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn2bxYvJoGNrKRI_qdSz_4yzvb3cb4fAH9ceYQFjR_9uAEZMURpwc6MtLySD6or_U3ZqGOar6YaRBYI9P0zXsmlvMfJMhnsT3ju1y_VYYmIlsnRE_LvPoj8oWVj1t8fsDzsfW85jW8YbqQ4=k-no"],"When":"2026-4-9"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Cynthia Fransiska","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIJqBh10ytpcbKdagjwUmDqwA5PNKACq_ks6A7RUlVfJv5uIF8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I booked a shared 9-11 seaters minibus from Hue to Da Nang on September 2025 from KLOOK App (you can use a free code “GGZUWN” for a discount with your booking in KLOOK App).

Turned out, I am very satisfied with the services and the quality of the vehicle comparing to the price I paid. It was very easy to book and no hassle at all, and the customer service was very responsive through a WhatsApp chat.

The minibus will pick you up in Hue City at location : Chan Cafe / Com nieu Chan (co so 2) in Google Maps, and you can wait the bus there while sipping a coffee or having a lunch there.

And then the minibus will drop you off in Da Nang City at some available points like in Da Nang International Airport or Highland Coffee Nguyen Van Thoai (this coffee shop located very near to My Khe Beach).

They assured me the replacement bus would be exactly the same class as the one I paid for. With no real alternative, I reluctantly agreed.

The replacement bus was in shocking condition - filthy, mold growing on the air conditioning vents, many seats that wouldn't recline properly. No bottled water, no TVs - amenities that were clearly advertised and included in the original, more expensive booking for which I paid. Btw, the driver was chain-smoking the entire trip.

Oh, and surprise: this "equivalent" bus was actually $12 cheaper per person than what I had originally paid, when I checked online later on.

When I politely asked for the obvious $12 price difference to be refunded, the representative simply ghosted me.

To top it all off, the support team behaves like a barely functional chatbot and eventually offered me a generous $2 refund per person... No comment here.

user_reviews: [{"Name":"Tinh Ho","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocITPw9D6wMxJ9pVUjD3EvAKmRh9Mg7kwKkn-RmdXNQ1lKXQNA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is hands down most reliable car rental place I’ve used living half a decade in Vietnam, best pricing and even better deal long term. They have all ranges of cars! a simple affordable older car to pick up grocery or take grandma to the doctors or brand new car, I just booked ahead, but even last minutes when a better car gets returned they informed me right away the new options and  swapped for me with a steep discount far less then promotion price. The low ratings are mostly people who caused and accident or scratched the car! Vehicles take a lot of down time to repair! Any shop would have to take the car out of commission a couple days to get the entire scratched area sanded down, premiered, color matched painted and watch paint dry! Take any car old or new how many days out of service? Yea so they don’t paint it every week! And also ti pay a deductible and repaint for every scratch? Most shops get the entire car repainted once a year using the money that was collected for damages, besides big accident and bodily injury the insurance will sky rocket if claimed every month for scratches, if you owned a car in your life you would know. 300k-2mill for convince of scratch repair is insanely cheap! If not you keep paying for that car and take it out to a repair shop and get it fixed for cheaper! Waste more time and more money than complain! Traffic fines are 5-20 million 1.5 million is only 60$. You think the damages not worth 1.5 million then take pictures and post it too.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jack Moreci","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW2sfC-_Js8UJdFXh8X9R2u9lKZlV7ROAE_9nA5Zjvp8NneGuDS=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent service! title: QH discovery travel
address: 219 Nguyễn Đình Tứ, Hòa Khánh, Đà Nẵng 550000, Vietnam
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"James Smyth","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUguLRsacKpbz9FppeOrlbJkbAn82Huzst84XJMyoYe5wE5jDi2IA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba12-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Good journey with QH discovery from Phong Nha to Ninh Binh. The bus left 5 mins early and actually arrived in Ninh Binh over 2 hours early, which was a nice surprise. The beds are very comfy and spacious. The USB-C socket didn’t work but the USB-A one did. There was one bathroom break, 2.5 hours into the 5 hour journey. There was no food or shop available at that bathroom break, so bring snacks.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Thunderdracu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUUBoZt592cU6dmylnH0B4CGRKCMu2NP7iPvhkiviPf86hykVf3=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"I traveled from Phong Nha to Hanoi with this bus company and arrived at destination.

However during the journey, we had to change busses in Ninh Binh and somehow they didn't have my name on the list for boarding the second bus. After a few back and forth and after the bus had already left, they found my informations. They brought me to the bus with a car and was able to board it.
The employees really looked for solutions and I felt helped out.

The bus company called me afterwards with more excuses than a real apology. I feel more strongly about this call then the incident itself since the guy just hung up on me while I was talking to him.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Julia Jager","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLLPOZVowfV2ZI8vj77BFUG7Zmz0VVDlOeY_KpkAVwyhOs-lg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Do not recommend. Our bus ride was supposed to be around 6 hours but took almost two hours longer. Not because of traffic but because they made many random stops to drop stuff off. Also my backpack was very wet when I got it back.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kristian Glover","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJYiqQCA4vAmxrT8WZCKr8mgeofBOhZKQaRwz5zdv7Lu6Zf9A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"DO NOT BOOK WITH QH. IF YOU HAVE CANCEL.

They turn up late, overbook buses and don't allow for any breaks on journeys.

I have just witnessed them attempt to leave a young girl under the age of 10 on the side of the road as she darted off to go to the toilet on the side of the road. They proceeded to begin driving off without her and this caused her to panic, trip and cut her leg. Ive never seen anything like it.

I politely asked if I could photograph her foot so I can add it to my review, which I have.

They also refused to allow anyone else to step off the bus and use the bathroom including other children, women and men.
What do you expect people to do on a 5 hour bus journey?

Overall a completely horrible experience in country that I'm very fond of.

I know I'm only a drop in the ocean to these companies but I hope it deters you from booking with them.

I believe this to be the only bad review I've left on my google account as I always try to review with the upmost integrity and truths.

I love travelling Vietnam and I love its people. But not this company and not the men who run this bus.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Anton Arrivabene","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIzzclGKuZF9HouQQKWkLdQIW4YSanopUSOJr5T8Fb1jhxEKw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I booked a bus from Hue to Phong Nha in Vietnam. I waited for over an hour and a half at the pickup point, but the bus never arrived. There was no communication even though I provided my phone number and email. To this day, I haven't been able to speak to anyone in charge. I am also still waiting for a refund. Unreliable and unprofessional.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Anne Bühlbäcker","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX95NMFAw9t7XwqG-JmpU50ag4KVyghGBoKSDyEz0GQsZbwrxYw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"The bus never came, the number on the ticket does not exist. The driver was good and the seats comfortable, but there were no seatbelts at all, which took some getting used to, and, in my eyes, isn't acceptable conditions, especially for a 4-hour trip.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ellen Conlon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJdzIUgId0koVnnu3Ksn4GiXj4tYMpjVzDNt8HKIf3iF7MveA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"I used this service yesterday with my partner, and though it was easy to book and we were picked up on time, the driving experience was quite terrifying. We have been in Vietnam some weeks now and are aware that people drive differently to home (Netherlands), for example blowing the horns or changing lanes a lot. However, with other drivers in Vietnam we have felt quite safe. On our journey from Hue to Da Nang the driver we had with this company was driving extremely fast, in an erratic and risky way. He was using his phone for the whole journey, using social media (for example looking at photos on Facebook and sending voice messages and reacting to messages on other apps). Even when we were in the process of overtaking countless vehicles, he was using the phone. When we arrived at our destination we felt lucky to be alive. For me, I would rather have arrived late and feel safe, than arrive early and feel scared. I think since there are 8 passengers in the car, the driver should drive in a safer way because they are responsible for 8 other human lives (and maybe more people if we had hit someone else).","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Caroline","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVh30fjtKtS8YhYLht_1Niz24rt6aq8dcYqB3w2o4EjPYMsr674=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"My partner and I took a shared van from Hue to Da Nang, and are shocked and feeling lucky to be alive. We have never in our lives experienced such erratic, reckless and fear-inducing driving. The driver was using his phone the entire time (phone, voice messages, social media, typing texts), overtaking every car in sight all the way from Hue to the centre of Da Nang, and speeding much much faster than anyone else on the road, while beeping aggressively all the way through. We feared for our life the entire way. We are shaken.
On a more positive note: it was very easy to book and we had good communication with the company through WhatsApp, we also arrived early (but would rather have arrived late feeling safe…).","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Karolien Van Ham","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJPjZUJ102D-2QV1vKr7vVuH4_iuZKYKUqhY7jAcmnhNz7d=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Easy to contact in English on WhatsApp. We booked last minute. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Nhan Phan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJNav8DJv1tNwqbgGTtFKuXPRnVCHg821g3V31AGxw7HnRKtz4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba12-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Small, lovely and very clean airport.

Arrival: Immigration can get crowded at times, but I’ve noticed that whenever the crowd grows, the staff quickly open additional lines to ease the flow. It’s also one of the very rare airports where trolleys are neatly pre-arranged right at the luggage belts — such a thoughtful and lovely touch.

Getting a taxi or Grab is very easy, with clear instructions for passengers.

Departure: Nighttime can be especially crowded due to the number of flights. Even though the airport looks quite small, everything usually moves quickly and efficiently.

Inside the airport, there are real trees placed here and there, which makes the space feel pleasant and relaxing. They also often organize activities for passengers. From what I understand, the local tourism department plans these initiatives to further promote travel — so thumbs up for that.","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn0QrwuRFMzn7ZRLGTOlqZXlWZ8lrhx_-aKkkKxLoE31NMaSluFmqZ7Dowyqd6UnJPXCrSlh31vfuperzRK2OmRHhi_IoYgcxKszav0UcUidUny26mb9VEoXOp3NFsFXSg-Dd0u9c3MZDtI=k-no","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn2rpZwdonTtw8SdXKQg2_-U6vD8K0UvTrDVohpf5fDC7NNNP-7_5vaJBaqS2ZUrMm1tYR8lmi57977gy7d_DQvSW9ZVPp4qqwn0lvqjB4d2Go6lSCZxQT6YtmUW3WxWO1Iq3N-Pb5_K112o=k-no"],"When":"2026-3-5"},{"Name":"Le Hoang Giap","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVTkTtA8MgNdYSKN3_ysJOu9PJaVhj0X9Pb8CkBgBb1cmA3o0A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba12-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I visited Cảng hàng không quốc tế Đà Nẵng (Da Nang International Airport) on a travel day, and it stands out as one of Vietnam’s most comfortable and efficient airports. As soon as you arrive, the layout feels intuitive with clear signage and wide walkways that make navigating terminals easy, whether you are coming in or heading out. The building is modern with plenty of natural light and open spaces, which gives the terminal a bright, relaxed feel even during peak times.

The check‑in and security process moves smoothly, with helpful staff and well‑organized counters that keep lines moving. Inside the departure area, there’s a good mix of seating, shops, cafes, and dining options that suit different travel styles. If you want a quick coffee before your flight, there are familiar cafe choices alongside local spots where you can grab a Vietnamese coffee or snack. For longer waits, there are casual restaurants serving full meals, so you don’t have to rush through your breakfast or lunch before boarding.

One of the nicest things about this airport is how clean and well kept it feels. Restrooms are easy to find and maintained regularly, and there are charging stations scattered throughout the seating areas so you can keep devices powered up without hunting for outlets. Free Wi‑Fi is available and works reliably, which is especially helpful if you need to check flight details or send last‑minute messages before departure.

The boarding gates are spacious and organized, and announcements are clear in both Vietnamese and English, which helps reduce stress when flights are called. Staff at the information desks are friendly and ready to assist if you have questions about flights, connections, or airport facilities.

Overall, Da Nang International Airport makes traveling in and out of the city straightforward and pleasant. It doesn’t feel cramped or chaotic like some airports can, and the range of services and amenities makes it easy to relax before your flight. Whether you are arriving after a long journey or departing to your next destination, it’s an airport that feels efficient, welcoming, and well designed for both domestic and international travelers.","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn2fx_Z-2qFy6y3co3W81iOLWN_ZMIre6X5nlStif5dG9Idg-fCcnKo8o21WI_yV4u3hiWqKo3MCfr7qR0077awdsfyEesNjBJDXDX6SoNTTdNetS1xfemJ1H_yJmK8rdSiWybso48uOti1Z=k-no","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn0Hxv1gwt2EdQJHeIdjtl9knA5AyUg9pwqE64_HK927iLJ3A9wxGV9rxaigCLfvGn4QOJJ2GLX_ibr5fFv_YQGxCsMp6HGOqcOdavYh1C0UIWiSDdZv2Gw7JoaU8HGnPGrVxtxrP6cqo-pP=k-no"],"When":"2026-3-9"},{"Name":"Tharakesha B A","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXHDdQKGdXTFKBcboTDhAvzeZ5taJyJEe6_zAM_FYvS9ccxF0D7Tg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba12-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Small, clean, tidy, very well-kept, and top-notch service. I had a connecting flight in Hong Kong to Da Nang, and my luggage was not loaded onto my flight on time. But the airport staff took great care, told me not to worry about the luggage, took my hotel address, and when my luggage arrived on the next flight, they sent it by cab. It reached me safely in about 8 hours. The responsible person gave me his WhatsApp number and kept me in the loop about the happening. The airport is very clean, well organized, and easy to navigate. The staff are friendly, professional, and clearly know what they are doing, which makes the whole travel experience smooth and stress-free.

If you’re looking to plan a fun and stress-free getaway, I definitely recommend checking them out!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kristine Nachod","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLqgOOGXn06CDe0enWWTw4zE5b_t3nfhUyq0lSgJUqpvRkLV7E=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We arrived in Da Nang not knowing that there wasn’t too many travel agents in the area.  We googled for travel agents & SAM Travel Agency popped up with one other that we could walk to.  Obviously we checked out both locations & feels that SAM’s was very reasonable in price of the tours & we even exchanged our US currency there too with better rates then others.  The receptionist at SAM’s was very patient with us as we couldn’t decide which tour to booked.  She helped us figured out which one is better.  We booked a smaller group tour to Ba Na Hills & enjoy it.  We also booked a private tour to Linh Ung Pagoda, Marble Mountain, Coconut forest & Hoi An Ancient town.  It was a wonderful experience especially our tour guide Zenzen was exceptional.  She was very laid back, informative & on time with our tour.  I don’t feel too rush as we were going to each locations.  She even took our pictures too.  :). We would definitely use SAM’s Travel Agency again when we come back to Da Nang.  :D. I highly recommend this business.","Images":null,"When":""}]

volume_up
Bến xe Trung tâm Đà Nẵng - Ấn tượng hiện đại, tiện nghi và chuyên nghiệp
Bến xe Trung tâm Đà Nẵng gây ấn tượng mạnh mẽ bởi sự hiện đại, tiện nghi và chuyên nghiệp. Nơi đây sở hữu cơ sở hạ tầng khang trang, thoáng mát, với nhiều khu vực chức năng được bố trí hợp lý, đáp ứng nhu cầu đa dạng của hành khách.

Khu vực phòng vé rộng rãi, có hệ thống quầy vé hiện đại, nhân viên nhiệt tình, chu đáo, hỗ trợ tận tình cho khách hàng trong việc lựa chọn vé xe phù hợp. Phòng chờ rộng rãi, có đầy đủ chỗ ngồi, khu vực vệ sinh sạch sẽ, cùng hệ thống wifi miễn phí, mang đến sự thoải mái cho hành khách trong thời gian chờ đợi.

Bến xe còn ghi điểm bởi hệ thống an ninh camera giám sát chặt chẽ, đảm bảo an toàn cho hành khách và tài sản. Dịch vụ xe buýt đa dạng với nhiều tuyến xe đi các tỉnh thành trong cả nước, đáp ứng nhu cầu di chuyển của hành khách. Chất lượng xe đảm bảo an toàn, êm ái, cùng đội ngũ lái xe chuyên nghiệp, mang đến trải nghiệm di chuyển thoải mái và an toàn.

Nhìn chung, Bến xe Trung tâm Đà Nẵng là điểm đến lý tưởng cho những ai muốn di chuyển bằng xe khách tại Đà Nẵng. Nơi đây mang đến sự hài lòng cho hành khách bởi sự hiện đại, tiện nghi, chuyên nghiệp cùng chất lượng dịch vụ hoàn hảo.","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn2KCwyji5_QAcV3mhhpxtrCYd4KH5ssYA1kjtqcMBAi6YZMkzA1URswDQYJpe-29WY1a2nkXdrKJ8R7iwz0gWhe9qVugCI8ca81k4taqXSFNgOqz1onE_BLD4L6XVDQaqWxUT8=k-no","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn0OQVB9JS9MhSnXkP3so8HJsgyQp1dyacf9qxlsYfSIRtK_ng_5xfHPCIuq1IjmytJ4JhIQM37OJjFLJPaoBJMDu_S31vI99UlAG_1e1pxwmZ2sQt6hyA0HfEq2hICSGe0akzVrCg=k-no"],"When":"2024-4-26"},{"Name":"Truc Tran","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWv2zvEA1suS-qHEmS9e7JSxAR0nf0EH-9jGQbPz6o-r4Y-cz1J=s120-c-rp-mo-ba12-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dịch vụ cho thuê xe ở Đà Nẵng giá rất hợp lý, phục vụ nhiệt tình. I was impressed with the safety standards, the calm and well organized stations, and the clean restrooms. The staff were helpful and provided clear information about the train tickets. Booking through the website was also easy and convenient. If I have the chance, I would definitely use Vietnam Railways again.","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn0PmP9mrpPdjgtrg5pK_rXLBC3d1ufwoqn_IMAmoNmvJmiXVhilHDt0lOKl1KHoX2d-WyUxsdwD9odCY-s-4zf9OzIKWHQAhl03J4-7rlMoCdTFtXeCMg0ZWQrKBx5M3fxSVh6ewq0GFAfG=k-no","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn2NsGwQEz8DDmFW_Is1cEjviN6J0fOpdd_KZPNNNLOqahkRTdnUnIz0G7dAEZjaD4UCfPHqWbyBAMreC4pqahiUx4rfgr7-wF8psCxVhc3pxk-Gg7CDH-EWIoKu3ykU7AdnpMrBE9H4TrIq=k-no","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn0_39ZZyPlpyqQmnPTtW0vucQkZTX75gaeeV1ld4-cTAMHozPeDH-hYoDu75EM9wlt8cdHOb22u3csMMnk5XsfH2bGilvx0rRxafVi7lJEO5RS_bL6upFM_SkfGsfIJUHdrans4jkkVsfrB=k-no","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn2xs9nZcv6W8KB3ySfRNWm5IDYvmiZs1UlrzsUIlrpiXsfrVk4nZ4nW5dYpmsmX2ouO5D6a_GCHbJZJZzjl6wcFaJ_k_mFE4uOG-GmXt2rWZYtuOvOq0PS7TFmBZyfRWS40O1tfikKj7WIg=k-no","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn1yZNvoX0OjULHQqqqblLhqYmwOTwGqCzNpVFGcyKbATBK0FtR2sXvxgJyJ51vZPXdA82V1LfkYRN7P9jGlI8zUSlU_RssEIMRFF-I7a70BMRLdcaGcqpoymhoh6PAx5v5KNzNDtf2rq_yQ=k-no"],"When":"2026-1-14"},{"Name":"Google Lum","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIFthABF3V0ORgF5auuZB18UdFzZWqC-nLtOn7hjm98QyP5PEg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba12-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Was here recently in February to take the train to Hue.
With just a backpack could walk here from hotel, not too far, about 30 mins.
Tried out the route and distance the night before and also to explore the area around the station.

Took 9am stage train, not the special tourist train.
Train is comfortable but view was obstructed because of mesh wire.
Why is the mesh wire there??

Luckily there was an empty seat at another coach with clear glass window.
Also on this train the staff came around once with a pushcart to sell drinks, snacks and cooked food.

Took the tourist train back from Hue.
The tourist train is more costly and it has a common/food coach with high glass window for a better view.

There is a lounge at Da Nang station which you can pay for use during ticket purchase.

Overall it was an enjoyable ride both ways with clear skies and great views of the sea.

Update
Came again in October recently.
Have pre-booked the 0745am tourist train to Hue but was told when checking-in that the train had been cancelled.
Very bad, no email SMS to inform earlier although details were provided during online booking a few days prior.
For that it dropped a star.

Luckily there were still a few seats on the 0900am slow train and the nice counter staff got us the tickets for it.
Unfortunately the seats were not on the coastal side where the view of the sea was.

With a couple of hours to spare before departure, went to have pho and doner kebab nearby.

It was raining slightly so the views were affected.
Also an area outside Da Nang were being developed, like a major construction marring the scenery.

The return trip by train again was not For several nights in a row, extremely loud motorbikes on Thuan Phuoc Bridge have made it impossible for people living nearby to sleep.

This is not about normal traffic.
At night, when the bridge is empty, high-speed riding creates very strong low-frequency noise that travels far and seriously affects residents’ health: sleep deprivation, anxiety, heart palpitations, weakened immune system.

I understand that night riding can feel free and exciting.
But for people living next to the bridge, it causes real physical harm. Some of us haven’t been able to sleep properly for days.

If you ride here at night — or know someone who does — please consider avoiding this bridge late at night or riding quietly.
It would make a real difference for many people.

title: Ray Limousine
address: 08 Ng. Quyền, Sơn Trà, Đà Nẵng, Vietnam
open_hours: {"Friday":["Open 24 hours"],"Monday":["Open 24 hours"],"Saturday":["Open 24 hours"],"Sunday":["Open 24 hours"],"Thursday":["Open 24 hours"],"Tuesday":["Open 24 hours"],"Wednesday":["Open 24 hours"]}
complete_address: {"borough":"Son Tra","street":"08 Ng. Quyền","city":"Da Nang","postal_code":"","state":"Son Tra, Da Nang","country":"VN"}
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Caitlin Harvey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIZACKFyco0oG3ldwM-d2ExdhWFXK0iwpkX7nbi8GxLOS3N_w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Please avoid! We literally got off an hour away from our destination, at a random gas station, because of our driver's erratic behavior.

We booked the bus (10 passenger van) service from Da Nang to Hue. The van was full.

Our van driver's road rage was insane. Rushing up on vehicles, swerving back and forth, and relentlessly laying on his horn to intimidate the cars ahead of him into moving out of the lane. As he would pass them, he would continue to lay on his horn while leaning into his window to stare each driver down as he went by. Every single vehicle. These were innocent people going the speed limit and doing nothing wrong! He was acting like he was going to run every vehicle off the road.

After about 30 minutes of this, my partner asked the driver in Vietnamese to drive safely and slow down, and was completely ignored. This continued the entire time we were in the van.

About 40 minutes into the trip, the driver pulled into a gas station, and we decided we were done putting our safety into the hands of someone who cared so little about anyone else. The woman next to us, a complete stranger, expressed that she was leaving too. We told the driver we were not getting back in, and we hailed a taxi.

When the taxi arrived, our van driver took pictures of us with the taxi, and harassed our new driver as we were leaving. As if we were the ones doing something wrong.

When we reached out to the company about our experience, there was zero accountability. Zero remorse or understanding. If our driver was being so safe and 'going the allowed speed', why did THREE people decide to get off? When your passengers would rather potentially strand themselves at a gas station than get back in the car with you, it means you're a terrible driver.

We've been traveling around southeast Asia for 2 months, and have taken countless busses, taxis, and other public transportation. Never have we felt so unsafe. This was not a misunderstanding of the driving culture. This driver will seriously hurt somebody someday if they haven't already.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ju Moo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJTz2OKtgelJ7wr3xrxYx8cPg_dkVmdg0dO1F7PtX7jAYN-gA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba12-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"tl;dr : STAY AWAY FROM THEM

I was supposed to leave Danang for hue at 2pm ; around 12, I got a message asking me to wait till 3pm. The driver picked me up at the meetup location (in the middle of nowhere), then proceeded to pick up a couple from another place, then a lady from the airport.

And when I thought we were finally leaving Danang, we made another stop to pick up a box to deliver in Hue. We didn't make it out of the city before 4pm (my original time of arrival...).

Then, when we finally got to Hue, he took one of the passengers to her hotel and tried to have me get off there as well ; even though I was assured that he would leave me at my hotel doorstep. When I refused, he brought the other passengers to their homestay, even though mine was closer, then he went on to deliver his parcel, and kept me for last. I had to send a message to the person who contacted me about the initial delay to ask them to make the driver take me to the hotel, he wouldn't listen to me and sigh angrily every time I asked to be dropped off like I was supposed to
I got to my hotel around 6:30pm, more than 1 hour  later than the first passenger he dropped off.

Also, the driving was pretty rough, even by vietnamese standards. Driver can't maintain his speed, so he's constantly accelerating then braking suddenly, making you literally jump in your seat. Didn't feel dangerous but was really uncomfortable. He was on his phone a lot, (wich was maybe more dangerous) when he was not smoking.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Finn","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK3lo9ECrR_uVCCNLe1Lv-h3uzUtgg6ZOypQaxHgZrTmDawtww=s120-c-rp-mo-ba12-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"I don't know why anybody should be crying about Ray's driving skills. He drove very safe, considerate and fast.
HOWEVER
There were several insects crawling inside the van, which was very disgusting🤢
AND
It took Ray more than 2.45 hours to complete the drive instead of the promised 2h!! This was because of several private detours he took (like buying and delivering food to a house).

Overall quite nice.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Luca Porcu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUCiWgxAleyq4NKPAz-jWOdN-66JTUpOw94L2rjfxHkS_fwn0Oe=s120-c-rp-mo-ba12-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"We travel 3 hours with jackets and hoods on cause the AC was too strong. Pointless to complain with the driver because this seems to be common in Vietnam. Plus the reckless driving felt like in a noisy roller-coaster. Overall useless and really uncomfortable","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Derek","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKpW4Yr1rKYYyWet9Gswl-ag8yv1_65Il7Z1-pp1cPzyycnUg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"The reviews highlighting unsafe driving practices at Rays Limousine raise serious concerns about passenger safety. Despite requests for safer driving in his own language, the driver ignored them, displaying a lack of professionalism. Qureshi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXXjlNGjtK1foEiqo9NXuBr6PESljKh-jaBLIxEfUD6xwSb2eQD=s120-c-rp-mo-ba12-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Son Tra Marina is a visually appealing spot and makes for a nice quick photo stop – the architecture is unique and the sea view is lovely.

That said, the whole place feels quite staged and limited. It’s not really a destination where you’d spend much time – more like a backdrop than a full experience.

Entry is only allowed if you purchase a drink, which feels a bit restrictive, especially if you’re not thirsty or just want to walk around. The drinks aren’t cheap either, so in the end you’re paying for the scenery.

Worth a quick visit if you’re nearby and want some nice pictures, but don’t expect anything authentic or particularly perfect if you're an influencer, or looking to capture a picture-perfect video, or photos.

I watched videos prior to coming here and it's a bit of false advertising as it is actually a restaurant, not a marina, per se. It is a restaurant located AT the marina. It's also more picturesque in videos and photos than in actuality.

You won't be allowed to enter without making a purchase, which is fine. The food was decent: we got a chicken sandwich, and the coffee was strong and flavorful. So it's all good.

After you make a purchase, find a spot and they will bring your order to you. Don't expect service though, I asked for ice and they never brought it, I ended up going up to the counter to ask for some. Best part though, is you can stay as long as you like.

[{"Name":"Jaroslav PTAAH","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUZ13D5AGW9jRwBGw6Vgk9CvaegoACqAfsLwfb69YWIXUtUx9pCtg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba12-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Dong Dinh Museum – a peaceful museum hideaway in the forest

A lovely little museum hidden in the forest, with a calm, almost zen-like atmosphere. The setting alone is worth the visit — nature, traditional architecture, and a nicely curated collection that feels authentic and unpretentious.

That said, while it’s very pleasant and interesting, it’s not exactly a mind-blowing, “you must tell everyone” kind of place. More of a slow, enjoyable stroll than a jaw-dropping experience.

Overall: a great stop if you like culture mixed with nature. [{"Name":"Tasha (AutismFamilyTravelGuide)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXQ-SVO7x2Rhf0IPO2ybkW-JBDW_txkINULMCNSdFrVx7geEkNH=s120-c-rp-mo-ba12-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Tiên Sa Port is Đà Nẵng’s main cruise terminal, beautifully located between the mountains and the bay. It’s a quiet, organised port that gives cruise passengers a smooth arrival into central Vietnam. The moment you dock, you’re met with scenic views of the coastline and Sơn Trà Peninsula, making it one of the most picturesque cruise entries in the region.

The terminal area is clean, secure, and easy to navigate, with buses, taxis, and pre-arranged tours waiting just outside the restricted zone. It’s an ideal gateway to Đà Nẵng, Hội An, Marble Mountains, and Monkey Mountain. Expect a short shuttle or transport ride before reaching the main city areas from the port. Coincidently there were three shady taxidrivers at the drop-off point, who offered to drive us to our hotel for 3x Grab price. We ordered our own Grab taxis and one of these drivers told us he had been threatened by the ones already present.
I do not believe it to be a coincidence, that these three scammers where waiting for us at a clearly improvised and completely unfit drop-off location.
My advice: avoid TKC buses!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"PW PW","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIRIfGqcXPA8zyP-hnR2PbSx5Jkygp1YCi-O_UVjDgVPhD4dg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I put one star because there was no less. I really do not recommend this company.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Axel Hartmann","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJvmRaMV2ygeGqbk5snADagAZFVLXYWnVVhupgbGQRjUnK7zw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I traveled on November 13, 2024, from Ninh Binh to Da Nang (departure at 8:50 PM), and it was one of the most terrifying experiences I have ever had on a bus. Despite having traveled by bus in various countries, this journey was by far the worst.

The driver drove recklessly for 14 hours straight without a driver change. He ignored speed limits, tailgated other vehicles, and overtook dangerously in almost every situation, including on crowded roads. The excessive honking and aggressive driving made it impossible to feel safe. We even arrived an hour earlier than planned, which only confirmed how dangerously fast he was driving.

My friend and I observed several near-miss accidents during the trip. We repeatedly asked the Assistant on the Bus to tell the driver to slow down and be more considerate, but our requests were completely ignored. The driver's assistant, who should have been managing the situation, appeared to have taken pills at a rest stop and slept throughout the journey. When we addressed our concerns, he seemed very drowsy and unresponsive.

This level of disregard for passenger safety is unacceptable. If you value your safety and peace of mind, I strongly urge you to avoid traveling with this company. The lack of professionalism and the apparent violation of basic safety standards make this service highly dangerous.

For your own well-being, choose a more reputable provider.","Images":null,"When":""}]

ホテルから空港、空港から同じホテルまで2回グラブタクシーを利用したが2度とももめた。
1回目は昨年（2024）のこと。ホテルから空港までグラブを呼んだが、運転手は空港使用料がどうのこうの言い出し、値段を吊り上げようとした。そういう輩がいることは知っていたので、私は突っぱねたが、不愉快だった。
2回目は空港からホテルまで（Mar.2025）。
国内線のグラブの乗り場に行くと「グラブタクシー」と言う男が言うので、私は足を止めた。男は「キム・T」というネームプレートを私に見せた。偶然にも予約したドライバーはキム・Tだったので、私は男が迎えに来たと思った。ところが、男は私の行く先を聞くし、グラブが出した値段より高い料金を言ってきた。おかしいと思ったが疲れていたので一刻も早くホテルで休みたいと言う気持ちが勝って男の車に乗ってしまった。すぐにスマホに矢のように電話とwhatappがきた。本物がちょっと遅れてきて私がいないので連絡してきたのだ。横取りされた男は初めは英語だったが、最後は興奮してハングル文字の嵐だった。もちろん私はわからない。わからない方が良かったと推測する。ホテルの部屋で落ち着いてから、私は横取りされたコリアンドライバーに「私は騙されたと思う。男の名前はキムで車種は…」とwhatappで送信した。男は落ち着いたようで「どこに行くにも俺にメッセージを送れ」と英語で兄貴的なことを言ってきた。たぶん私の方がずっと年上なのにコリアンらしいと思った。
白の車体で側面に赤字でOUTLANDERと描いてある車には気を付けてください。

After a lot of dangerous driving which made it near impossible to sleep, the bus driver crashed into a truck very badly, crushing two of the front seats, which luckily no one was sitting in otherwise they would have been very badly injured or killed.
